The optimizer returns HTTP 400 Bad Request for this form, so data-overload-icon.svg, tailored-industry-icon.svg and market-pulse-icon.svg render broken/empty on the clone. (network-intelligence-icon.svg uses the correct single-slash path and loads.) The live shows all four icons.

Every clone section reports 0 visible images while the live shows imagery. Live hero (L1) rotates three headlines: 'Global expertise with decades of hands-on experience', 'Accelerate Your Cloud Journey With Top-notch Azure Services', and 'Revolutionize Your Business with Our Azure Expertise'. The clone hero (C0) shows only 'Accelerate Your Cloud Journey With Top-notch Azure Services', missing the other two rotating headline variants.

allGaps.section: Trusted by Organizations Around the Globe
allGaps.detail: The clone displays the 5 client logos (Savills, CityU, Daraz, Rombola, Superior Farms) as a bare centered strip but is missing the live's blue centered heading 'TRUSTED BY ORGANIZATIONS AROUND THE GLOBE' above the logos and the white card boxes around each logo. Logos themselves are correct.

allGaps.section: Pre-Built Fabric Data Analytics & Reporting Solutions
allGaps.detail: Tabs widget and the 3 tab labels match, but the active 'Decision Intelligence' tab body is truncated in the clone (only the opening sentence) whereas the live shows fuller copy including 'For leadership teams, clarity matters more than complexity:' plus two additional paragraphs.
